title: Server-Side Request Forgery via Unrestricted URL Download
path_hint: The server performs an HTTP request to the supplied URL and writes the response to disk.
expected_strategy: allowlisted outbound request handling with URL validation at the client boundary

title: SQL injection via dynamic query construction
path_hint: The malicious string is passed to the `searchProducts` function, which concatenates it into the SQL statement.
expected_strategy: sink-level parameterization or prepared query execution
